title: Airmash: Multiplayer Beat Barrage
description: Tap incoming missile locks on the beat to keep a multiplayer squadron airborne and stack a rising combo.

howToPlayJson.title: Airmash: Multiplayer Beat Barrage
howToPlayJson.objective: Survive a 3-minute airmash by tapping missile lock rings in rhythm before they hit your squad, building combo multipliers and posting the highest score on the leaderboard.

controls.input: Tap a lane ring as its lock reticle closes on the beat
controls.outcome: Missile is jammed, beat continues, combo increases

controls.input: Swipe left or right when a red warning wave flashes
controls.outcome: Your squad shifts lanes and avoids an unblockable volley

controls.input: Hold on a glowing center beacon through one full beat
controls.outcome: Releases a pulse that clears all current locks for bonus points

steps: Missile locks spawn in 3 lanes around your squadron, each synced to the music pulse.
Tap each lock exactly on the beat to jam it before impact.
Every 10 clean hits raises your score multiplier by 1x until you miss.
Red warning waves introduce swipe-only dodge moments between tap patterns.
The song speeds up, mixed patterns appear, and double-lock volleys start after the first minute.
The run ends after 3 squad hits or when the track finishes; your score goes to the local leaderboard.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Perfect beat jams score the most, late or early jams score less, each uninterrupted streak increases a combo multiplier, burst clears grant bonus points per lock destroyed, and surviving to the end grants a finish bonus.
tips: Watch the shrinking lock ring, not just the missile sprite.
Save the burst hold for crowded double-lock sections.
Swipe early on red waves; they cannot be tapped away.
Short accurate taps are better than mashing because misses break multiplier.
